name: ComplexToe
short_description: Strategize boldly, move swiftly, and unlock the potential of intricate thought!
detailed_description:
Strategize boldly like in chess, move swiftly like in geometry dash, and unlock the potential of intricate thought!

Invite a friend and prepare for an epic battle which requires focus and strategic skills.

"The mixture of strategic thinking, a limited thinking time and various costumability makes it a very unqiue experience."

Game features

  • Play a thinking-based action game!
  • Unlock and play on large fields!
  • Explore various win combinations!
  • Challenge yourself in single-player mode with the Impossible Adventure!
  • Test your strategic skills against AI. Can you beat all levels?
  • Compete against a friend in both online and local PC modes!
  • Unlock achievements, complete daily challenges, and more!
  • Create your own customized levels and share them with the world!
  • Practice offline to sharpen your skills!
  • Unlock icons and colors to customize your experience!
  • Enjoy a variety of different soundtracks available!
  • Explore the hidden door after you beat all offline levels!
